title: Team Building Escape Room Event
title_zh: 團隊建立密室逃脫活動

all.en: Subject: Save the Date — Team Building Escape Room Challenge
all.zh: 主旨：請預留時間 — 團建密室逃脫挑戰

all.en: Hi everyone,
all.zh: 嗨，各位同仁，

all.en: Get ready for an unforgettable team building experience next month.
all.zh: 請準備迎接下個月難忘的團建活動。

all.en: Human Resources is thrilled to announce our escape room event.
all.zh: 人資部很興奮地宣布密室逃脫活動。

all.en: The activity will take place on Saturday, July 12th.
all.zh: 活動將於 7 月 12 日星期六舉行。

all.en: We have booked the popular Mystery Manor venue downtown.
all.zh: 我們已預訂市中心熱門場地神秘莊園。

all.en: Participants will be divided into teams of six players.
all.zh: 參與者將分為六人一組進行挑戰。

all.en: Teams will be assigned across departments for better mixing.
all.zh: 分組將跨部門安排以促進交流。

all.en: Each team has sixty minutes to solve all the puzzles.
all.zh: 每組有六十分鐘時間破解所有謎題。

all.en: Themes range from haunted libraries to secret spy missions.
all.zh: 主題從鬧鬼圖書館到秘密間諜任務皆有。

all.en: You can choose your preferred theme during registration.
all.zh: 您可於報名時選擇喜好的主題。

all.en: Spaces are limited so early sign-up is strongly encouraged.
all.zh: 名額有限，強烈建議提早報名。

all.en: The registration link is included at the bottom of this email.
all.zh: 報名連結附於本郵件下方。

all.en: Please register by Friday, June 27th at the latest.
all.zh: 最遲請於 6 月 27 日星期五前完成報名。

all.en: Late entries cannot be guaranteed a spot.
all.zh: 逾時報名恕無法保證名額。

all.en: The event will begin promptly at 1 p.m. in the main lobby.
all.zh: 活動將於下午一點整於大廳準時開始。

all.en: A short welcome briefing introduces the rules and safety guidelines.
all.zh: 簡短的歡迎簡報將說明規則與安全注意事項。

all.en: Then teams will rotate through three escape rooms.
all.zh: 之後各組將輪流進入三間密室。

all.en: Each round is followed by a fifteen-minute break.
all.zh: 每場關卡後設有十五分鐘休息時間。

all.en: Snacks and drinks will be available throughout the afternoon.
all.zh: 整個下午皆備有點心與飲品。

all.en: We expect the program to finish around 5 p.m.
all.zh: 整體活動預計於下午五點左右結束。

all.en: Afterwards, we will move to a nearby restaurant for dinner.
all.zh: 之後將前往鄰近餐廳共進晚餐。

all.en: Dinner attendance is optional but warmly encouraged.
all.zh: 晚餐參與為自願性質但熱烈歡迎。

all.en: Please indicate dietary preferences when signing up.
all.zh: 報名時請註明飲食偏好。

all.en: Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options are available.
all.zh: 提供素食、純素與無麩質選項。

all.en: Transportation between the office and venue will be arranged.
all.zh: 辦公室與場地間將安排接駁交通。

all.en: A chartered bus departs from the office at 12:30 p.m.
all.zh: 包車將於下午十二點半從辦公室出發。

all.en: Return shuttles will run after dinner around 9 p.m.
all.zh: 回程接駁車約於晚上九點晚餐後發車。

all.en: Family members are warmly welcomed at the dinner portion.
all.zh: 歡迎家屬參加晚餐環節。

all.en: Please add their names when you register for the meal.
all.zh: 報名晚餐時請加註家屬姓名。

all.en: Prizes will be awarded to the fastest escaping teams.
all.zh: 破解最快的隊伍將獲得獎品。

all.en: First place wins a gourmet dinner voucher for the whole team.
all.zh: 第一名將獲得全隊高級晚餐券。

all.en: Second and third place receive movie tickets and coffee cards.
all.zh: 第二、三名可獲電影票與咖啡卡。

all.en: There are also fun categories like best teamwork and best costume.
all.zh: 另設有趣味獎項，如最佳團隊合作與最佳裝扮。

all.en: Yes, you are encouraged to dress up if you wish.
all.zh: 沒錯，歡迎大家盛裝打扮參加。

all.en: Costumes can match your room's theme for extra fun.
all.zh: 服裝可呼應您隊伍的主題以增添樂趣。

all.en: Please remember to wear comfortable shoes for moving around.
all.zh: 請穿著舒適鞋款方便活動。

all.en: Photos will be taken throughout the event by our office photographer.
all.zh: 公司攝影師將於活動全程拍照記錄。

all.en: Highlights will appear in the next company newsletter.
all.zh: 精彩畫面將刊登於下期公司電子報。

all.en: If you prefer not to be photographed, please let us know in advance.
all.zh: 如不希望入鏡，請事先告知。

all.en: All photos remain internal and are not shared externally.
all.zh: 所有照片僅於內部使用，不對外公開。

all.en: This event is a fantastic opportunity to bond with colleagues.
all.zh: 這是與同事建立情誼的絕佳機會。

all.en: Collaboration and communication are at the heart of every puzzle.
all.zh: 合作與溝通是破解每道謎題的核心。

all.en: You don't need any special skills, just enthusiasm and creativity.
all.zh: 您不需具備特殊技能，只需熱情與創意。

all.en: Quiet thinkers, bold leaders, and detail spotters all shine here.
all.zh: 安靜思考者、果敢領導者與細節觀察者皆能發光。

all.en: We hope this event sparks new friendships across teams.
all.zh: 我們希望本活動能促成跨部門新友誼。

all.en: Last year's escape event received glowing feedback from attendees.
all.zh: 去年密室活動獲得與會者極佳評價。

all.en: Many colleagues asked us to organize another round this year.
all.zh: 許多同仁主動詢問今年是否再次舉辦。

all.en: We listened, and we are happy to bring it back bigger and better.
all.zh: 我們聆聽心聲，很高興以更精彩規模回歸。

all.en: If you have any questions, please contact the HR coordinator.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請洽 HR 活動聯絡人。

all.en: Her name is Lisa, and she sits next to the printer room.
all.zh: 聯絡人為 Lisa，座位在印表機室旁。

all.en: Lisa can also help if you need accommodation requests.
all.zh: 如有特殊需求協助，亦可請 Lisa 協助。

all.en: Sign up today and let the adventure begin.
all.zh: 立即報名，展開精彩冒險。

all.en: With sincere appreciation,
all.zh: 由衷感謝，

all.en: Human Resources Team
all.zh: 人力資源團隊 敬上
